questions.stem: What is the first step a cashier must complete before starting a new meal service period at the POS terminal?
options: Log in with your assigned employee ID and verify the correct meal period is selected
Count the cash drawer and submit a cash report to the manager
Enter the day's menu items manually into the item list
Verify that all student accounts have a positive balance
questions.explanation: Logging in with your employee ID and confirming the meal period ensures accurate transaction records and accountability for each service period.
questions.source_quote: Log in with your assigned employee ID and verify the correct meal period is selected before accepting any transactions.

questions.stem: True or False: A cashier may override a student's meal account balance restriction without manager approval.
questions.source_span: Only a cafeteria manager or authorized supervisor may override a student account balance restriction.

distractor_basis.span: Only a cafeteria manager or authorized supervisor may override a student account balance restriction.

questions.explanation: Balance overrides require manager-level authorization to protect program integrity and financial accountability.

questions.stem: When a student forgets their ID number, what is the correct procedure?
options: Ask the student to use the keypad to look up their own account
Skip the student and ask them to return with their ID
Process the transaction without recording it
Charge the meal to a generic account
questions.explanation: Students may use the POS keypad to look up their own account number, which maintains accurate records while keeping service moving.
questions.source_quote: Ask the student to use the keypad to look up their own account

questions.stem: A cashier should press the ___ button at the end of each meal service to finalize the period totals.
questions.source_sentence: A cashier should press the End of Period button at the end of each meal service to finalize the period totals.
questions.explanation: The End of Period function closes out the session and generates the daily tally for the cafeteria manager.

questions.stem: Which item category typically requires a separate payment category code in SchoolCafé POS?
options: A la carte items sold individually (snacks, extra entrees)
Water and milk included in a meal combo
questions.explanation: A la carte items sold outside of the standard meal must be tracked separately to distinguish reimbursable meals from non-reimbursable sales.
questions.source_quote: A la carte items sold individually (snacks, extra entrees) require a separate payment category code

questions.stem: True or False: SchoolCafé automatically applies free or reduced-price meal benefits when a qualifying student is identified at the POS.
questions.source_span: SchoolCafé automatically applies free or reduced-price meal benefits when a qualifying student is identified at the POS.

distractor_basis.span: SchoolCafé automatically applies free or reduced-price meal benefits when a qualifying student is identified at the POS.

questions.explanation: Automatic benefit application ensures eligible students receive their entitlement without manual cashier intervention, protecting student privacy.

questions.prompt: Put these steps in the correct order for processing a cash transaction at the POS:
steps: Enter the student account or select 'Cash Sale'
Ring up the items selected by the student
Collect payment and enter the cash amount tendered
Provide change and a receipt if requested
questions.source_quote: Enter the student account or select 'Cash Sale', ring up the items selected by the student, collect payment and enter the cash amount tendered, provide change and a receipt if requested.
questions.explanation: Following this sequence ensures accurate totals and a proper receipt trail for cash reconciliation.

questions.stem: What should a cashier do if the POS screen freezes during a transaction?
options: Note the student name, close the application, and reopen; report to the manager
Force-restart the computer immediately without saving
Complete the transaction by hand and enter it later
Ask another cashier to process all remaining students
questions.explanation: Noting the student and reporting to the manager ensures no transaction is lost and the incident is documented for IT follow-up.
questions.source_quote: Note the student name, close the application, and reopen; report to the manager
